platforms.title: Platforms
platforms.description: Which platforms to scrape dealer profiles from.

dealerUrls.title: Direct Dealer URLs
dealerUrls.description: Direct arabam.com/galeri/ or sahibinden.com/magaza/ profile page URLs. Use this for specific dealers.

searchByCity.title: Search by City
searchByCity.description: Discover all dealers in this city. Turkish city name (e.g. 'istanbul', 'ankara', 'izmir').

searchByMake.title: Search by Make
searchByMake.description: Discover dealers that have listings for this vehicle make (e.g. 'BMW', 'Toyota', 'Volkswagen').

maxDealers.title: Maximum Dealers
maxDealers.description: Maximum number of dealer profiles to scrape (1–500).

includeInventory.title: Include Inventory Analysis
includeInventory.description: When enabled, scrapes the dealer's active listings (up to 100) and computes inventory statistics: average/median price, top makes, mileage distribution, and fuel type breakdown. Adds 10–50 requests per dealer — significantly slower and more expensive.

sahibindenCookies.title: Sahibinden Session Cookies
sahibindenCookies.description: Optional, but required to actually scrape Sahibinden. If omitted while 'sahibinden' is selected, the actor logs a warning and skips that platform. Export cookies from sahibinden.com using EditThisCookie (Chrome) or Cookie-Editor (Firefox).

proxyConfig.title: Proxy Configuration
proxyConfig.description: Proxy settings. TR residential proxies required for Sahibinden, recommended for Arabam.
